name: Pogo Stick: Ultimate Challenge
short_description: A game that doesn’t believe in you — it tests your patience, stubbornness, and whether you can climb to the top. Think you can?
detailed_description:
Welcome to a game that won’t go easy on you.

You’re a bald guy with a pogo stick and a set of questionable life choices.
Armed with stubbornness and optimism that fades faster than your progress.

This is a climb where every mistake is a ticket back down.
And if you fall — don’t worry, the mountain isn’t going anywhere.
It patiently waits to greet you at the bottom again.

🖱 Control

• Fully mouse-based.
• It’s convenient until the moment you realize the mouse is your biggest enemy.
• Wrong angle — you fall.
• Hand twitched — you fall.
• Thought about food — still fall.
⚙ Features

• 🧠 Skill growth — the game doesn’t get easier; you just get used to the suffering.
• ⛰ A route full of surprises — sometimes pleasant, usually not.
• 😤 Physics that work perfectly… until they start working against you.
• 🎢 Emotional rollercoaster — every climb is triumph, every fall is philosophy.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Multiplayer (even worse)

If you want to feel true disappointment in humanity — invite your friends.
👥 Up to 4 players, each guaranteed to ruin your jump.
🌀 Two skills:
• Pull — drag a friend closer so you both fall together.
• Push — launch your buddy into orbit so he can rethink his life mid-air.

The multiplayer atmosphere is always friendly.
Well… in theory.

🎯 Goal

Your goal is simple: climb.

🔥 Main Question

Will you reach the top?

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil
